The '''1996 London Broncos season''' was the seventeenth in the club's history and their first season in the [[Super League]]. Coached by [[Tony Currie (rugby league)|Tony Currie]], the Broncos competed in [[Super League I]] and finished in 4th place. The club also reached the fourth round of the [[1996 Challenge Cup|Challenge Cup]].
